Part B Q7

NEETs

Reasons
1. Study pressure are much higher than before, some youth might not be able to bear the pressure > so that they choose the become a school drop out

2. Youths are more self-centred > can't cooperate with co-worker > become jobless eventually

3. Youths have higher self-esteem than the generation before, when getting job training, they often treated in a harsh manner > They always want their views to be valued 師傅(masters/teachers) don't care about their view 之類 > not to take job training


Solution
1. Government can introduce funding the create a short-term working programme when youths can learn how to cooperate with others and some working skills.

2. Promote the message of acceptance to youths.

You have just heard this song about opportunities.
Look
If you had
One shot
Or one opportunity
To seize everything you ever wanted
In one moment

Q.7 NEETs
1）香港經濟結構改變
知識型社會，NEETs冇工作方面需要既知識所以難搵工，頹，所以打機黎逃避現實，搞到有NEETs出現
2）政府福利太好
年青人可以申請綜援，引月入中位數做例指出番工月入唔高，同時引個人綜援既收入都有幾乎一半，但佢地唔洗勞動，慢慢慣左，變懶，變NEETs，另外，越黎越多人都咬老綜，歧視人咬老綜既風氣改變左，令年青人更厚面皮會拎
3）除左讀書冇其他方面發展，衰左個時冇退路/冇計劃人生
建議
